description: You are a Smart Building Consultant designing an IoT sensor network for a retrofit of the FZK-Haus residential building. Based on the specifications in /home/ga/Desktop/iot_sensor_spec.txt, enrich the pre-loaded IFC model in BlenderBIM (Bonsai) by defining at least two distinct IfcSensorTypes and placing corresponding IfcSensor occurrences with physical proxy geometries. Ensure all sensors have the correct IFC4 PredefinedType, are logically located, and are spatially contained within building storeys. Save the project to /home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_iot_sensors.ifc.
